statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); output_style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name'); dir_name=$(basename "$current_dir"); if [ -d "$current_dir/.git" ]; then git_branch=$(cd "$current_dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); git_status=$(cd "$current_dir" && git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$git_status" -gt 0 ]; then git_indicator=" ±$git_status"; else git_indicator=""; fi; git_info=" ($git_branch$git_indicator)"; else git_info=""; fi; printf "%s in %s%s | %s" "$model" "$dir_name" "$git_info" "$output_style"
